creator: john.wolfe@broadcom.com
text:
VMware has release open-vm-tools 10.3.10.

Please see:

    https://github.com/vmware/open-vm-tools/releases/download/stable-10.3.10/open-vm-tools-10.3.10-12406962.tar.gz

    https://github.com/vmware/open-vm-tools/tree/stable-10.3.x

For a cumulative list of changes, please see:

    https://github.com/vmware/open-vm-tools/commits/stable-10.3.x
